sections.paragraph:
Original: חפה

Transliteration: châphâh

Phonetic: khaw-faw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cover, overlay, wainscotted, covered with boards or panelling
    1. (Qal) to cover
    2. (Niphal) to be covered
    3. (Piel) to cover, overlay

Origin: a primitive root (compare H2644, H2653)

TWOT entry: 707

Part(s) of speech: Verb
